{"type":"flowgraph","mermaid":"graph TD
 FreeText["free-text description"]
 BuildPrompt["buildAIPrompt()"]
 Clipboard["prompt on clipboard"]
 LLMTool["paste into Claude/GPT/etc."]
 LLMEmit["LLM emits JSON"]
 JSONTab["paste into JSON tab"]
 Validate["validateFixture()"]
 StatusBar["status bar"]
 Generate["generateNotebookDiagram()"]
 SetScene["setScene()"]
 LiveRender["pict-section-excalidraw live render"]
 ExportSvg["exportSvg({exportEmbedScene:true})"]
 Download["download .svg"]

 FreeText --> BuildPrompt --> Clipboard --> LLMTool --> LLMEmit --> JSONTab
 JSONTab --> Validate
 Validate -->|errors| StatusBar
 Validate --> Generate --> SetScene --> LiveRender
 LiveRender --> ExportSvg --> Download
","style":"notebook"}
